title: (Bearish Signal) REPL, RSI Indicator left the overbought zone on May 04, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that REPL's price could be shifting from an uptrend to a downtrend. Traders may consider selling the stock or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked back and found 23 similar cases where REPL's RSI Indicator left the overbought zone, and in 20 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 87%. Current price $36.22 is above $29.14 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 04/01/21 - 05/04/21, the price experienced a +3% Uptrend, while the week of 04/27/21 - 05/04/21 shows a -1% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/1s9c5u6l2cx61.png?width=1529&format=png&auto=webp&s=d50150182bd5259fc73f83770839778c6e740596

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The 10-day RSI Indicator for REPL moved out of overbought territory on May 04, 2021. This could be a bearish sign for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 23 similar instances where the indicator moved out of overbought territory. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 20 of the 23 cases, the stock moved lower in the following days. This puts the odds of a move lower at 87%.

The Stochastic Indicator demonstrated that the ticker has stayed in the overbought zone for 6 days. The longer the ticker stays in the overbought zone, the sooner a price pull-back is expected.

REPL moved below its 50-day Moving Average on May 04, 2021 date and that indicates a change from an upward trend to a downward trend.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where REPL declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 82%.

The Aroon Indicator for REPL entered a downward trend on April 27, 2021. This could indicate a strong downward move is ahead for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options.

[Full information about signal](https://tickeron.com/news/10938960-replimune-group-repl-32-53-rsi-indicator-left-the-overbought-zone-on-may-04-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
